  1. cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model

Uses of Package
cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model

Packages that use cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
Package
Description
cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
This package holds the logic of the game.
cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view
This package takes care of the UI.
  • Classes in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model used by cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model
    Class
    Description
    Board
    Class generating and holding the playing board.
    Direction
    Enum class with directions.
    Exit
    A logical class holding coordinates of an exit.
    GameEndReason
    Enum of reasons to end the game.
    GameSettings
    The settings a player can choose at the initial screen.
    Hero
    Class that represents logic of a hero (one play piece).
    Tile
    Class of logic representing a single tile on the board.
    TimeReset
    Class holding a time-resetter
  • Classes in cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.model used by cz.cuni.mff.domanyoa.magicmaze.view
    Class
    Description
    GameEndReason
    Enum of reasons to end the game.
    GameSettings
    The settings a player can choose at the initial screen.
    Logic
    Class that takes all the logic of the game into one place.
